hero.headline: Expert Ford Mustang Repair & Performance Service in Dallas
hero.subheadline: From classic restoration to modern performance tuning, our certified technicians deliver precision care for every Mustang generation.

featureSections.title: Complete Mustang Maintenance & Repair
featureSections.body: We handle everything from routine oil changes to complex engine overhauls. Our factory-trained technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostics to keep your Mustang running at its best.
featureSections.cardBody: Every service includes a thorough inspection of brakes, fluids, belts, and tires at no extra cost.

featureSections.title: Unleash Your Mustang's Potential
featureSections.body: Whether you want more horsepower, better handling, or a custom look, our performance experts can spec and install the right upgrades for your driving style.
bullets: Cold air intakes, exhaust, and tuning
featureSections.cardBody: Maximize power and drivability with our in-house dyno tuning service, tailored to your specific setup.

whyChooseUs.title: Mustang-Only Specialists
whyChooseUs.description: We work exclusively on Ford Mustangs, so our expertise is unmatched. Every technician knows the ins and outs of your pony car.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No surprises. We provide clear, upfront estimates and explain all recommended work before starting any service.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time. Most routine services are completed same-day, and we keep you updated throughout the process.

whyChooseUs.title: Lifetime Warranty on Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work. All repairs are backed by a nationwide lifetime warranty for your peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: These guys are Mustang wizards. They diagnosed a tricky electrical issue that two other shops couldn't figure out. Fair prices and great communication.

testimonials.quote: I brought in my '65 Mustang for a full restoration. They treated it like it was their own car. The craftsmanship is incredible.

testimonials.quote: Best shop in Dallas for Mustangs. They installed a supercharger on my GT and the tune is perfect. Car runs like a beast.

cta.headline: Ready to Give Your Mustang the Care It Deserves?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Mustang Service Center difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to high-performance builds, our certified technicians deliver expert care for every Ford Mustang. Explore our full range of services below.

services.title: Routine Maintenance & Oil Changes
services.shortDescription: Keep your Mustang running smoothly with our comprehensive maintenance services.
services.longDescription: Regular maintenance is key to extending the life of your Mustang. We use high-quality synthetic oils and OEM filters to ensure optimal engine protection. Our multi-point inspection catches potential issues early, saving you time and money.
benefits: Extends engine life and improves fuel economy
Complimentary multi-point inspection with every service

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We perform a thorough visual and digital inspection of your vehicle, checking fluids, belts, hoses, brakes, and tires.

process.title: Service
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the manufacturer-recommended oil grade. We also top off all other fluids.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We start the engine, check for leaks, verify oil pressure, and reset the maintenance reminder. You get a detailed report.

faqs.question: How often should I change the oil in my Mustang?
faqs.answer: For modern Mustangs with synthetic oil, every 7,500-10,000 miles is recommended. Older models may require changes every 3,000-5,000 miles. We'll advise based on your specific model and driving habits.

faqs.question: Do you use genuine Ford parts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use genuine OEM Ford oil filters and recommended oil grades to maintain your warranty and ensure optimal performance.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint and fix engine issues quickly.
services.longDescription: Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment can identify issues in your Mustang's engine, transmission, and electronic systems. From check engine lights to performance problems, we provide accurate repairs with transparent pricing.
benefits: Detailed explanations of issues and repair options
Lifetime warranty on parts and labor

process.title: Diagnostic Scan
process.description: We connect advanced scanners to read fault codes and live data from your Mustang's computer systems.

process.title: Analysis
process.description: Our technician interprets the data and performs additional tests (compression, fuel pressure, etc.) to confirm the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We complete the necessary repairs, clear codes, and test-drive your Mustang to ensure everything is working properly.

faqs.question: What does a diagnostic service include?
faqs.answer: We scan all engine and transmission control modules, check for pending codes, and perform a visual inspection of related components. You receive a detailed report with recommended repairs.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose intermittent problems?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can perform extended diagnostics and road tests to replicate intermittent issues. Our advanced tools capture data during the problem to identify elusive faults.

services.title: Performance Tuning & Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Unlock your Mustang's full potential with custom tuning and bolt-on upgrades.
services.longDescription: Whether you're looking for more horsepower, better throttle response, or improved handling, our performance experts have the knowledge and parts to transform your Mustang. We offer custom dyno tuning and installation of popular upgrades.
benefits: Custom dyno tuning for maximum power and drivability
Expert installation of intakes, exhausts, superchargers, and more
Before-and-after dyno graphs to show gains

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your goals, budget, and driving style to recommend the best combination of parts and tuning.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our certified technicians professionally install all components, ensuring proper fitment and function.

process.title: Dyno Tuning
process.description: We put your Mustang on our in-house dyno to fine-tune air/fuel ratios, timing, and boost for optimal performance and safety.

faqs.question: Will tuning void my warranty?
faqs.answer: Tuning can affect your powertrain warranty. We recommend checking with your dealer, but many customers choose to tune after their warranty expires. We offer a warranty on our tuning services.

faqs.question: How much horsepower can I gain?
faqs.answer: Gains vary by setup. A cold air intake and tune can add 20-30 hp. A supercharger kit with tuning can add 150+ hp. We'll give you realistic estimates during consultation.

services.title: Brake & Suspension Services
services.shortDescription: Stop confidently and corner with precision using our brake and suspension expertise.
services.longDescription: Your Mustang's braking and suspension systems are critical for safety and performance. We offer everything from pad replacements to full coilover installations, using top-tier components for street and track use.
benefits: Improved stopping power and pedal feel
Enhanced cornering and reduced body roll
Custom alignment tailored to your driving style

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, brake fluid, and suspension components for wear or damage.

process.title: Replacement/Upgrade
process.description: We install your chosen parts with precision, torquing all fasteners to spec and using proper procedures.

process.title: Test & Align
process.description: After installation, we test the brakes for proper bedding and perform a four-wheel alignment to ensure optimal handling.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my Mustang's brakes?
faqs.answer: It depends on driving habits. Typically, front pads last 30,000-50,000 miles and rear pads 40,000-60,000 miles. We inspect them at every service and advise accordingly.

faqs.question: Do you offer performance suspension upgrades?
faqs.answer: Yes, we carry brands like Ford Performance, Eibach, Bilstein, and KW. We can install lowering springs, adjustable coilovers, sway bars, and more to transform your Mustang's handling.

about.headline: Dallas' Mustang Experts Since 1995
about.mission: To provide Ford Mustang owners with expert, honest, and high-quality service that keeps their cars running at their best — whether on the street or the track.
story: Mustang Service Center was founded in 1995 by lifelong Mustang enthusiast John Miller. What started as a small two-bay shop has grown into Dallas' premier destination for Mustang care. John's philosophy was simple: treat every car like it's your own, and never cut corners. That commitment to quality and integrity quickly earned a loyal following among local Mustang owners.

Today, our team of ASE-certified technicians continues that tradition. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment, ongoing training, and forge strong relationships with top parts suppliers. Whether you drive a classic '65 fastback or a 2024 Dark Horse, you can trust us to deliver the expertise and passion your Mustang deserves.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: We focus exclusively on Ford Mustangs, ensuring deep knowledge of every generation and engine.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest assessments, transparent pricing, and never recommend unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only premium parts and follow factory procedures to deliver lasting results.

coreValues.title: Passion
coreValues.description: We love Mustangs as much as our customers do, and it shows in every job we complete.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Mustang Service Center
contact.subheadline: Ready to book your service or have questions? Call or stop by — we're here to help.
